productDisplayName: Wrangler Men's Wanderer's Dream Orange T-shirt
description: CompositionOrange round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with embroidered lettering on the front Wash care Light machine wash Do not bleach Warm iron on reverse Do not dry clean Dry flat/ reverse Do not scrub Indulge in the fantasy of leaving civilisation far behind and travelling to wild forgotten places. This burnt orange tee from wrangler, inspired by the spirit of the wandering cowboys, looks great when teamed up with jeans for an outing all by yourself or with friends. Add on a pair of stylish footwear from the wide international range available at myntra and stay cool and comfortable in this pure cotton tee.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2', Chest-39.5", Waist-32"
